title: Cobble+ SMP
description: This modpack brings together the Cobblemon mod with enhanced Minecraft gameplay, featuring breeding, TMs, new tools, bosses, and dungeons for an epic adventure.
body:
# 🔹 **Cobble+ SMP** 🔹

Are you ready to embark on a unique Cobblemon adventure? Our modpack is designed to bring an enhanced and immersive Pokémon experience into Minecraft, featuring a rich economy, trading systems, custom events, and much more!

### 🌟 Key Features:

🛒 **Player-Driven Economy & Trading** – Trade Pokémon and items via the GTS system. Set up your own shop or negotiate trades directly with other trainers!

🎯 **Pokémon Hunt & Capture Streaks** – Complete hunting challenges to earn amazing rewards! Increase your capture & KO streaks to boost your chances of encountering stronger and shiny Pokémon.

💎 **Legendary & Alpha Pokémon** – Discover rare and powerful Pokémon, including Alpha Pokémon, which are larger, stronger, and provide an even greater challenge!

🔥 **Mega Evolutions** – Unlock the true potential of your Pokémon with Mega Evolutions! Use Mega Stones to power up your Pokémon in battle and dominate your opponents.

🏆 **Pokémon Battles & Tournaments** – Challenge other trainers in Pokémon battles, participate in tournaments, and compete for in-game rewards in special weekend events!

🏛️ **Player Gyms** – Players can create their own Pokémon Gyms, becoming Gym Leaders that others can challenge! You can also test your skills by battling against current Gym Leaders to earn badges and prove your strength.

🎮 **Public Multiplayer Server** – Cobble+ SMP includes a public server open to everyone! Join our community and experience the full potential of the modpack, battling, trading, and exploring with other trainers.

🔧 **Constant Updates & Bug Fixes** – I always trty to improve the modpack and server with new features, Pokémon, and optimizations!

⚙️ **Two Versions Available:**
⚡ Standard (4GB RAM min.) – Optimized for lower-end PCs.
🚀 Advanced (8GB RAM min.) – Includes visual enhancements that impact performance.

*

**Disclaimer:** Cobble+ SMP is a collection of mods created by various developers. I do not claim ownership over any of the mods included; I have simply put them together to create this experience.
